summary: The diff implements REQ-23, REQ-24, and REQ-25 with strong coverage. HeroSection.tsx is redesigned with the correct headings, colors, CTA buttons, and background image reference. WhyChooseUsSection.tsx is redesigned with the black gradient, 4 benefit boxes, gold checkmarks, and correct layout. One notable gap is that the actual image asset file does not appear in the diff as an added file, though it is referenced in code.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and place the hero background image (aks-hero-bg-dark.dim_1920x1080.png) in frontend/public/assets/generated/ directory
missing_requirements.reason: The diff lists no added files. The image is referenced in HeroSection.tsx at '/assets/generated/aks-hero-bg-dark.dim_1920x1080.png' but there is no evidence the actual image asset was added to the repository.

hallucinated_features.description: Decorative gold bokeh glow and blue glow radial gradient overlay divs in the hero section
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not explicitly request these extra decorative glow overlays beyond a dark gradient overlay for text readability.

hallucinated_features.description: Location badge pill element showing 'Thoothukudi, Tamil Nadu · Digital Marketing Agency' above the main heading
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-23 does not mention a location badge or pill element as part of the hero redesign; only the heading, subheading, tagline, background, and CTA buttons are specified.

hallucinated_features.description: 'Our Advantage' label badge and a supporting subtitle paragraph in the WhyChooseUsSection header
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-24 specifies only the section heading 'Why Choose AKS Digital Media Solutions?' and the 4 benefit boxes; an 'Our Advantage' badge and subtitle paragraph were not requested.
